message:
style(fp-columnar,fp-frame,fp-io): clippy and rustfmt cleanup

- fp-columnar: simplify Bool-to-f64 match arm using pattern matching
  (Scalar::Bool(true) => 1.0) instead of if/else block
- fp-frame: remove redundant .into_iter() on zip argument (clippy
  useless_conversion lint); reformat test line breaks
- fp-io: remove redundant .into_iter() on zip argument in Excel parser

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
